objective: Add a simple playlist option where the user can add and save their favorite songs. Can consider a simple json database or SQLite
success_criteria: An option to click and save user's favorite songs on the frontend in the top 5 option
A database to save the user's favorite song
A page on the frontend to check the saved songs
A remove option in the database display to remove from the database
done_definition: All changed files are listed with intent
constraints: Stop on ambiguous failures and report blockers
